title: MinX, MinY, MaxX, MaxY Results
description:
MinX, MinY, MaxX, MaxY Results

MinX, MinY, MaxX, MaxY Results

The MinX, MinY, MaxX and MaxY results when combined together create what is called the extrema

of the blob.  The extrema is the coordinates of the blob's minimum enclosing rectangle.
  The best way to understand this is to examine the figure below.

Principle axes, center of mass, and extrema
